zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cusack於1295年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托時，他的父親Sir John Cusack24歲，母親Margaret FitzGerald26歲。他於大約1325年與Isolda Withington在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1386年在他的家鄉享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cusack于1295年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托时，他的父亲Sir John Cusack24岁，母亲Margaret FitzGerald26岁。他于大约1325年与Isolda Withington在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1386年在他的家乡享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cusack
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Brigid, Eamon, Fergus, Seamus.

Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cussac in Guienne, France, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Cūcius or Cussius + the locative suffix -acum. The surname died out in England, but is common in Ireland, where it was imported at the time of the Anglo-Norman invasion in the 12th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Cíosóg.

variants.name: Cuzick
meanings: Irish and English (Worcestershire): variant of   Cusack  . This form of the surname is no longer found in Ireland and is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cusick
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Cusack  , now found predominantly in Scotland.
Americanized form of Polish Kusik or Czech Kusík, Slovak Kúšik and Kušík.
Americanized form of Croatian Kusić, Croatian and Serbian Kušić (see Kusic ), or Serbian Ćušić (see Cusic ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Cusack was born in 1295, in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir John Cusack, was 24 and his mother, Margaret FitzGerald, was 26. He married Isolda Withington about 1325, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1386, in his hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cusack est né en 1295, à Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir John Cusack, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzGerald, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Isolda Withington environ 1325, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1386, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cusack 1295 in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Cusack 24 und seine Mutter Margaret FitzGerald 26. Er hat um 1325 in Irland Isolda Withington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1386 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cusack è nato il nel 1295 nel Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir John Cusack, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret FitzGerald, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Isolda Withington circa 1325, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1386, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cusackが1295年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスジャーラルドストウンで生まれた時，父Sir John Cusackは24歳，母Margaret FitzGeraldは26歳であった。約1325年にアイルランドでIsolda Withingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1386年に故郷で91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cusack(이)가 1295년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 그라르드스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Cusack(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret FitzGerald(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1325년 아일랜드에서 Isolda Withington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1386년 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cusack nasceu em 1295, em Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir John Cusack, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret FitzGerald, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Isolda Withington aproximadamente 1325, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1386, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cusack родился в 1295 г. в местности джиррардстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Cusack было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzGerald, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolda Withington около 1325 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1386 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год.

sm.BET. 1342 - 1347: mai le 1342 e o'o I le 1347

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cusack nació en 1295, en Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir John Cusack, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret FitzGerald, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Isolda Withington aproximadamente 1325, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1386, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años.
